name: Guidewire Insurance Platform API
what_it_does: Guidewire Cloud REST API for property and casualty (P&C) insurance core systems. Enables AI agents to manage insurance policies, process claims, handle billing, support underwriting workflows, and integrate insurance operations into customer and agent portals. Guidewire's platform (PolicyCenter, BillingCenter, ClaimCenter) is used by major P&C insurers globally.
use_cases: Querying and updating insurance policies from agent portal automation agents
Processing claims and managing claims workflows from claims automation agents
Handling premium billing and payment from billing integration agents
Integrating underwriting data with risk assessment models from InsurTech agents
not_for: Life insurance or health insurance without P&C focus
InsurTech startups without enterprise Guidewire implementations
Simple insurance quoting without full policy lifecycle management
best_when: A P&C insurance carrier using Guidewire Cloud wants AI agents to automate policy servicing, claims processing, and billing operations at enterprise scale.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance policy and claims operations have regulatory and financial consequences. Claims data and personal insurance information are highly sensitive. Guidewire requires enterprise customer relationship.

auth.notes: Guidewire Cloud uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization server per cloud account. Scopes control access to specific centers (PolicyCenter, BillingCenter, ClaimCenter). Enterprise customer credentials via Guidewire Community Portal.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise insurance carrier licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise per-user and per-center licensing; cloud hosting included
pricing.notes: Enterprise insurance software. Guidewire Cloud (SaaS) and on-prem options. Developer Program for integration partners. Community portal for documentation.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLAs

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance policy and claims operations are regulated and have financial consequences
PRIVACY: Insurance data includes highly sensitive personal and medical information
No public MCP server — enterprise REST API via Guidewire Community Portal
Separate APIs for PolicyCenter, BillingCenter, and ClaimCenter — different endpoints and auth
Enterprise carrier relationship required — not available for general integration
Guidewire version upgrades (annually) may change API — coordinate with carrier upgrade cycles
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Insurance policy, claims, and billing data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Highly sensitive personal insurance information. OAuth2 with center-specific scopes.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance policy, claims, and personal insurance data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Highly sensitive. OAuth2 with center-specific scopes.
